texto: Victor spread his hands and beamed. “There’s a truckload of supplies sitting on a dock in Madera. We got food, medicine, and machines ready to roll. All we need is a pigheaded truck driver with giant cojones and no brains to ram the stuff past the blockade and save the day.” The pilot leaned back and put his hands behind his head. “Naturally, I thought of Abel Yeager.
explicacao: Citação de Scott Bell sobre temas ligados a inteligencia. “Victor spread his hands and beamed. “There’s a truckload of supplies sitting on a dock in Madera.…” articula inteligencia, action, adventure em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e adventure.
